## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, production, and distribution.](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content pipeline is robust: \~70 potential articles in progress, 30-40 more planned, sufficient for 8+ weeks at 5 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Current focus: Establish baseline content; future plans include vertical-specific content and audience segmentation](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Website restructuring planned: Blog posts may be reorganized into resources, landing pages, and tools sections](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Email distribution strategy on hold due to bandwidth constraints, but identified as a future opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Pipeline

  - [Current goal: Publish 4-5 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Pipeline: \~70 articles in progress, 30-40 more planned](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Sufficient content for at least 8 weeks at current production rate](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Potential to increase production once team is more comfortable](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Two review gates:](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
    1.  Tax accuracy (long-term necessity)
    2.  Voice and comfort (expected to improve within a month)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Current focus: Technical resource for SMBs, general in nature](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Future plans:](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [Vertical-specific content (e.g., dentists, specific law areas)](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [Audience segmentation (large 2026 organizations, VSaaS partners, accounting partners)](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Derived content ideas: Directories recycling existing content](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Information hierarchy to be developed:](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
      - [Resource guides](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Tools (e.g., downloadable templates)](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

### Website Structure and Design

  - [Current setup: All content published on blog due to lack of alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Future plan: Reorganize content into different sections (e.g., town.com/resources, town.com/tools)](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Action item: Tony to discuss website and photo requirements with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Distribution Strategy

  - [Currently no email list or proper email capture system](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Future opportunity: Monthly newsletter featuring latest articles, especially about "big beautiful bill"](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Immediate action: Create a comprehensive blog post linking all BBBB-related articles](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Social media distribution (e.g., tweets) to be considered](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Tax accuracy review to remain long-term](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Voice and comfort review expected to improve within a month](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [More tax team members to be involved in the review process for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Darrell to contact Tony regarding website and photo requirements](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Continue reviewing at least 5 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [GrowthX to maintain flexible publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Add "Good Ideas" bucket to shared document for future initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Revisit email distribution strategy in 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Create a comprehensive blog post linking all BBBB-related articles](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Develop information hierarchy for website content organization (future task)](https://fathom.video/share/Z8tvBz3sAkaStNXmXNNR64FgXxbrtm3_?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
